title: 3d Arrows
body: **Tired of your flat, 2D arrows that lack depth? This lightweight resource pack transforms your arrows into fully textured 3D models, bringing a whole new dimension to Minecraft archery. (Pun intended)** This pack currently includes 3D models for the following arrows: - Regular Arrow - Spectral Arrow - (Works with) Tipped Arrow Coming soon: - Vanilla themed textures - Barebones themed textures (mabye)
